message:
test(harness): add security namespace xattr E2E coverage (bd-yf1el)

Adds 4 tests verifying security.* xattr behavior:
- ext4_fuse_security_xattr_requires_privilege
- btrfs_fuse_security_xattr_requires_privilege
- ext4_fuse_security_xattr_not_listed_without_privilege
- btrfs_fuse_security_xattr_not_listed_without_privilege

Tests verify EPERM/EOPNOTSUPP for unprivileged security.* writes
and absence of security.* in unprivileged listxattr results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
